sessionStart.bash: CK_LOG=$HOME/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p $HOME/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] sessionStart" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "/Users/rpay/.copilot/installed-plugins/context-keeper/context-keeper/server/start.js" hook session-start >> "$CK_LOG" 2>&1 && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] sessionStart OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] sessionStart FAILED" >> "$CK_LOG"; true

sessionEnd.bash: CK_LOG=$HOME/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p $HOME/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] sessionEnd" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "/Users/rpay/.copilot/installed-plugins/context-keeper/context-keeper/server/start.js" hook stop >> "$CK_LOG" 2>&1 && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] sessionEnd OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] sessionEnd FAILED" >> "$CK_LOG"; rm -f .github/instructions/context-keeper-debug.instructions.md; true

userPromptSubmitted.bash:
CK_LOG=$HOME/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p $HOME/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] userPromptSubmitted" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "/Users/rpay/.copilot/installed-plugins/context-keeper/context-keeper/server/start.js" hook user-prompt >> "$CK_LOG" 2>&1 && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] userPromptSubmitted OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] userPromptSubmitted FAILED" >> "$CK_LOG"; mkdir -p .github/instructions; printf -- "---
applyTo: "**"
---

## context-keeper hook log

```
" > .github/instructions/context-keeper-debug.instructions.md; tail -30 "$CK_LOG" >> .github/instructions/context-keeper-debug.instructions.md; printf "```
" >> .github/instructions/context-keeper-debug.instructions.md; true

postToolUse.bash: CK_LOG=$HOME/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p $HOME/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] postToolUse" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "/Users/rpay/.copilot/installed-plugins/context-keeper/context-keeper/server/start.js" hook post-tool-use >> "$CK_LOG" 2>&1 && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] postToolUse OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] postToolUse FAILED" >> "$CK_LOG"; true
